Scaling world models to such settings requires a principled multi-agent design:
articles.summary: 提出Gamma-World，面向多智能体交互场景的生成式世界模型，突破单智能体视频生成局限。采用多智能体设计原则，支持多个玩家或机器人共享空间同时行动，为交互式视频生成和机器人仿真提供新范式。

articles.title: Self-Improving Language Models with Bidirectional Evolutionary Search

articles.summary: 提出双向进化搜索方法，用于语言模型自我改进，克服best-of-N采样和树搜索中验证信号稀疏与自回归扩展局限。通过双向搜索增强候选多样性，提升推理和样本生成质量，无需额外人工标注。

articles.title: OmniVerifier-M1: Multimodal Meta-Verifier with Explicit Structured Recalibration

articles.summary: 提出OmniVerifier-M1多模态元验证器，利用验证器生成理由（而非仅决策信号）实现细粒度验证。通过显式结构再校准将元验证反馈融入多模态大模型，提升视觉输出可靠性和泛化能力。

articles.title: Agent Explorative Policy Optimization for Multimodal Agentic Reasoning
articles.excerpt: Vision-language models with extended reasoning succeed on complex problems, but many real-world problems require external tools that internal reasoning alone often cannot resolve. Agentic reasoning therefore interleaves two behaviors with a structural asymmetry: thinking (the self-contained default) and tool use (a high-variance auxiliary acting). We refer to this asymmetry as the Thinking-Acting
articles.summary: 针对视觉语言模型代理推理中思考与工具使用的不对称性，提出Agent Explorative Policy Optimization。通过策略优化平衡内部推理与外部工具调用，提升多模态代理在复杂任务中的工具利用效率。

articles.title: OSP-Next: Efficient High-Quality Video Generation with Sparse Sequence Parallelism, HiF8 Quantization, and Reinforcement Learning

articles.summary: 提出OSP-Next高效文生视频模型，融合混合全稀疏注意力（Skiparse-2D）、稀疏序列并行、HiF8量化及强化学习。大幅降低全注意力的二次计算成本，兼顾视频质量与生成效率。

articles.summary: 提出ProRL，将强化学习用于主动推荐系统，通过修正策略梯度估计优化路径奖励，兼顾短期接受与长期引导效果。有效引导用户偏好向目标物品转移，提升顺序推荐决策质量。

articles.title: Joint Training of Multi-Token Prediction in Reinforcement Learning via Optimal Coefficient Calibration

articles.summary: 提出最优系数校准方法，实现RLVR中多Token预测（MTP）与强化学习的联合训练。通过校准梯度系数缓解联合训练的性能退化，增强语言模型推理能力提升效果。

articles.title: Long Live The Balance: Information Bottleneck Driven Tree-based Policy Optimization
articles.excerpt: Recent advances in online reinforcement learning (RL) for large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated promising performance in complex reasoning tasks. articles.summary: 引入IB-Score（基于信息瓶颈理论）评估策略的探索-利用平衡，并驱动树形策略优化。改善在线强化学习中大语言模型的优化稳定性，提升复杂推理任务效果与效率。

articles.title: ResearchMath-14K: Scaling Research-Level Mathematics via Agents

articles.excerpt: LLMs have shown strong performance across diverse financial tasks, yet portfolio management (PM), a critical financial decision-making task, remains poorly benchmarked. articles.summary: 提出PortBench基准，覆盖资产相关性结构并评估完整投资决策流水线。弥补现有基准忽略多样化投资组合和端到端决策评估的缺陷，为LLM驱动的投资管理提供标准化测试。

articles.title: Alignment Tampering: How Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback Is Exploited to Optimize Misaligned Biases
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) is the standard method to align Large Language Models (LLMs) with human preferences. In this work, we introduce alignment tampering, a potential vulnerability where the LLM undergoing alignment influences the preference dataset, causing RLHF to amplify undesired behaviors. This arises from core limitations of RLHF: (1) preference datasets are const
articles.summary: 揭示对齐篡改漏洞：RLHF过程中，被对齐的大语言模型可能影响偏好数据集，导致强化学习放大不良行为。指出偏好数据集静态、依赖单一人类偏好等内在局限，提出对齐安全性新视角。

articles.title: Guiding LLM Post-training Data Engineering with Model Internals from Sparse Autoencoders
articles.excerpt: Model internals encode rich information about how a large language model (LLM) processes its training data; however, post-training data engineering largely relies on external signals and ignores rich intrinsic signals lying in model internals. We propose SAERL, a data engineering framework for LLM reinforcement learning (RL). It models three intrinsic data properties: diversity, difficulty, and qu
articles.summary: 提出SAERL框架，利用稀疏自编码器提取大语言模型内部状态，建模数据的多样性、难度和质量三个内在属性。引导强化学习后训练数据工程，提升数据选择的有效性。

articles.title: Governed Evolution of Agent Runtimes through Executable Operational Cognition
articles.excerpt: Recent advances in agentic systems increasingly treat code as an executable operational substrate rather than as a disposable output artifact. Prior work such as Code as Agent Harness frames validated agent-generated artifacts as runtime entities that can be created, executed, revised, persisted, and reused within long-running cognitive loops. However, the governance, lifecycle management, and ope
articles.summary: 提出通过可执行操作认知管理代理运行时演化，将智能体生成代码视为可运行实体，赋予创建、执行、修订、持久化能力，并建立治理与生命周期管理，推动长期认知循环中的智能体自我迭代。

articles.title: SIA: Self Improving AI with Harness & Weight Updates
articles.excerpt: Humans are the bottleneck in building and improving AI. Both the models and the agents that wrap them are written, tuned, and corrected by people. The long-horizon goal of an AI that can figure out how to improve itself remains open. Two largely disjoint research lines attack this bottleneck. The harness-update school has a meta-agent rewrite the scaffold of a task-specific agent (its tools, promp
articles.summary: 提出SIA框架，融合harness更新（元代理重写工具、提示等脚手架）与权重更新（模型微调）两条路线，实现AI自我改进。减少人工介入，朝着自主提升模型与代理性能迈出一步。

articles.title: Learning to Act under Noise: Enhancing Agent Robustness via Noisy Environments
articles.excerpt: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have facilitated the widespread deployment of LLMs as interactive agents capable of reasoning, planning, and tool use. Despite strong performance on existing benchmarks, such agents often exhibit notable degradation when deployed in real-world settings, where environments are inherently stochastic and imperfect. We argue that this discrepancy arises
articles.summary: 针对大语言模型代理在随机真实环境中性能下降问题，提出在带噪环境中训练以增强鲁棒性。通过模拟环境噪声提升代理对不完美条件的适应能力，弥合基准测试与实际部署差距。

articles.title: Efficient Agentic Reinforcement Learning with On-Policy Intrinsic Knowledge Boundary Enhancement
articles.excerpt: Agentic reinforcement learning (RL) has proven effective for training LLM-based agents with external tool-use capabilities. However, we identify that agentic RL training induces increasing redundant tool calls and blurs the model's intrinsic knowledge boundary, where the model fails to distinguish when tools are needed versus when parametric knowledge suffices. Existing solutions based on reward s
articles.summary: 提出在策略内在知识边界增强方法，减少代理强化学习导致的冗余工具调用。通过清晰界定模型何时需依赖工具、何时可用参数知识，提升LLM代理的工具使用效率与知识边界利用。
